items.caption: A two-story house with a visible fire emanating from the roof, suggesting a house fire. the fire is being actively fought by firefighters, as indicated by the presence of a fire hose and personnel. the house has a white exterior with a black roof and a chimney. there is a tree with bare branches to the left of the house, and a brick wall to the right. the sky is overcast, and the overall scene is one of emergency response.
